rationale: A is better anchored to Flink 2.2.0 artifacts: version-pinned REST docs, the likely correct `flink-runtime` handler and headers classes, and neighboring REST tests. B has likely-wrong module paths (`flink-runtime-web`) and only generic behavior claims, so it is less reliable for an engineer editing the code.

A: Test neighbors are plausible but not strongly proven as the closest suite for `JobPlanHandler`.
Some doc section anchors look brittle if those fragment IDs changed.
B: Likely wrong module path: Flink REST handlers are in `flink-runtime`, not `flink-runtime-web`.
Response DTO/package path is hedged and may be fabricated or outdated.
Does not name concrete implementation anchors with the same confidence as A.
